description:
Anthropic is seeking a Machine Learning Engineer to help build the next generation of AI systems. You'll work on cutting-edge foundation models, focusing on safety and alignment. We're looking for someone with strong Python skills, experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow, and a passion for responsible AI development.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement training pipelines for large language models
- Optimize model performance and efficiency using distributed computing
- Collaborate with research team on alignment and safety techniques
- Build evaluation frameworks to assess model capabilities
- Deploy models to production with FastAPI and GCP infrastructure

Qualifications:
- MS or BS in Computer Science, AI, or related field
- 2+ years of experience with Python and deep learning frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow)
- Strong understanding of NLP and transformer architectures
- Experience with cloud platforms (GCP, AWS) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
- Familiarity with distributed training and model optimization

We sponsor H1B visas for qualified candidates.

Flatiron Health uses technology and research to improve cancer care. We're looking for a Backend Engineer to build scalable data processing pipelines that handle millions of patient records. This role focuses on healthcare data infrastructure, ETL pipelines, and API development.

What you'll do:
- Design and build backend services processing large-scale medical data
- Develop RESTful APIs using Python (FastAPI/Django) for internal and external consumers
- Build ETL pipelines to transform and validate healthcare data (HL7, FHIR standards)
- Work with PostgreSQL, BigQuery, and data warehousing solutions
- Ensure HIPAA compliance and data security best practices
- Collaborate with data science team on ML feature pipelines

Required skills:
- 2-4 years of backend development experience
- Strong Python skills, experience with FastAPI or Django
- Database expertise (PostgreSQL, SQL optimization)
- Experience building data pipelines and working with large datasets
- Understanding of healthcare data standards (FHIR, HL7) is a plus
- Cloud experience (AWS or GCP)

Flatiron Health sponsors H1B visas.

Stripe is building economic infrastructure for the internet. We're looking for a Software Engineer to join our Infrastructure team, focusing on backend systems, APIs, and developer tools.

Responsibilities:
- Build and scale backend services handling millions of API requests daily
- Design reliable distributed systems with strong consistency guarantees
- Develop internal tools and frameworks used by engineering teams
- Work with Ruby, Python, and Go to build robust microservices
- Implement monitoring, alerting, and observability solutions
- Optimize database queries and caching strategies

What we're looking for:
- BS/MS in Computer Science or equivalent experience
- Strong programming skills in Python, Java, Go, or Ruby
- Experience with distributed systems and microservices architecture
- Deep understanding of databases (PostgreSQL, Redis, etc.)
- Cloud infrastructure experience (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Passion for developer experience and API design

Stripe is an H1B sponsor and welcomes international candidates.

Scale AI is the data platform for AI, working with companies like OpenAI, Meta, and Microsoft. We're hiring an AI Engineer to build ML infrastructure and evaluation systems.

You will:
- Develop ML models for data quality, classification, and annotation tasks
- Build evaluation frameworks for LLMs and foundation models
- Create data pipelines processing millions of training examples
- Work with PyTorch, TensorFlow, and modern ML tooling
- Collaborate with customers to understand their ML training needs
- Build APIs and services for real-time model inference

Requirements:
- MS in AI, Machine Learning, or Computer Science (or BS with 3+ years experience)
- Strong Python skills and deep learning framework experience (PyTorch preferred)
- Experience training and fine-tuning large models
- Understanding of NLP, computer vision, or both
- Familiarity with cloud ML infrastructure (GCP, AWS)
- Prior experience with LangChain, Hugging Face, or similar tools is a plus

Scale AI sponsors work visas including H1B.

Wayfair is transforming the home shopping experience. Join our engineering team in Boston to build customer-facing features and internal tools that power our e-commerce platform.

What you'll build:
- Full stack features using React, TypeScript, and Python/Java backend services
- Data visualization dashboards for business analytics
- RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints
- Microservices architecture with Docker and Kubernetes
- Real-time data processing pipelines using Kafka and Spark
- A/B testing frameworks and experimentation platforms

We're looking for:
- BS or MS in Computer Science or related field
- 2+ years of full stack development experience
- Strong skills in JavaScript/TypeScript and React
- Backend experience with Python, Java, or Node.js
- Database knowledge (SQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB)
- Experience with cloud platforms and containerization
- Bonus: Experience with data engineering or ML pipelines

Wayfair sponsors H1B visas for qualified candidates.
